# Data Source: okta_log_streams

Get a list of log streams from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_log_streams/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Filter expression to limit results (e.g. `type eq "aws_eventbridge"` or `status eq "ACTIVE"`).

### Read-Only

- `log_streams` (List of Object) The list of log streams. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--log_streams))

<a id="nestedatt--log_streams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `log_streams`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
